ClassificationPreRunEstimate.description: Public pre-run estimate for a bulk classification pass.

candidate_count.description: Retained candidate emails needing classification for the current model and prompt.
candidate_count.title: Candidate Count

cost_estimate_available.description: True when the endpoint can report a cost estimate, including zero-cost local mode.
cost_estimate_available.title: Cost Estimate Available

estimated_completion_tokens.description: Estimated completion/output tokens from the configured per-candidate budget.
estimated_completion_tokens.title: Estimated Completion Tokens

estimated_cost_usd.description: Estimated USD cost, or null when non-local provider pricing is not configured.
estimated_cost_usd.title: Estimated Cost Usd

estimated_prompt_tokens.description: Estimated prompt/input tokens from retained body text plus configured overhead.
estimated_prompt_tokens.title: Estimated Prompt Tokens

estimated_total_tokens.description: Sum of estimated prompt and completion tokens.
estimated_total_tokens.title: Estimated Total Tokens

model.description: Configured classification model identifier used to decide stale rows.
model.title: Model

prompt_version.description: Configured classification prompt version used to decide stale rows.
prompt_version.title: Prompt Version

token_estimate_method.description: Human-readable heuristic used for token estimates.
token_estimate_method.title: Token Estimate Method

ClassificationPreRunEstimate.title: ClassificationPreRunEstimate

ClassificationReprocessingPlan.description: Public read-only plan for controlled classification reprocessing.

blocked_by_missing_target_model_count.title: Blocked By Missing Target Model Count

ClassificationReprocessingPlan.title: ClassificationReprocessingPlan

ClassificationRunResponse.description: Public response for a completed classification batch run.
ClassificationRunResponse.title: ClassificationRunResponse

EmailAccountRef.description: Provider-neutral stable reference to a connected mailbox account.
EmailAccountRef.title: EmailAccountRef

EmailAddress.description:
Provider-normalized email address plus optional display name.

Provider adapters should lower-case parsed addresses, trim display names,
and deduplicate repeated recipients before returning metadata DTOs.
EmailAddress.title: EmailAddress

EmailAuthorizationStartResult.description: Provider-neutral authorization URL and scope request.
EmailAuthorizationStartResult.title: EmailAuthorizationStartResult

EmailConnection.description: Stored account connection metadata without raw OAuth token material.
EmailConnection.title: EmailConnection

EmailProviderConfigResponse.description: Email provider metadata exposed by the provider config API shell.
EmailProviderConfigResponse.title: EmailProviderConfigResponse

EmailSyncStatus.description: Current or last manual sync run status exposed at the API boundary.
EmailSyncStatus.title: EmailSyncStatus

GhostInferenceRunResponse.description: Public result for one ghost-inference run.
GhostInferenceRunResponse.title: GhostInferenceRunResponse

LLMModelHealthCheck.description: Availability result for one configured provider model.
LLMModelHealthCheck.title: LLMModelHealthCheck

LLMProviderConfigResponse.description: LLM provider metadata exposed by the provider config API shell.
LLMProviderConfigResponse.title: LLMProviderConfigResponse

LLMProviderHealthCheckResponse.description: Provider-neutral health-check result for the selected LLM provider.
LLMProviderHealthCheckResponse.title: LLMProviderHealthCheckResponse

ProviderConfigRequirementResponse.description: Non-secret provider setting required by a supported provider.
ProviderConfigRequirementResponse.title: ProviderConfigRequirementResponse

ProviderConfigResponse.description: Selected provider config plus supported provider metadata.
ProviderConfigResponse.title: ProviderConfigResponse

ProviderConfigUpdateRequest.description: Partial in-process update for non-secret Phase 0 provider config.
ProviderConfigUpdateRequest.title: ProviderConfigUpdateRequest

ProviderConfigValues.description: Non-secret provider settings visible at the API boundary.
ProviderConfigValues.title: ProviderConfigValues

ProviderSecretRequirementResponse.description: Secret reference metadata without the secret value.
ProviderSecretRequirementResponse.title: ProviderSecretRequirementResponse

ProviderSelection.description: Currently selected provider choices for the setup/config shell.
ProviderSelection.title: ProviderSelection

SecretRef.description: Stable non-secret identifier for a stored secret.
SecretRef.title: SecretRef

SetupStatusResponse.description: First-run setup readiness and selected non-secret provider settings.
SetupStatusResponse.title: SetupStatusResponse

SetupSubmitRequest.description: Non-secret first-run setup choices accepted by the Phase 0 API shell.
SetupSubmitRequest.title: SetupSubmitRequest

SetupSubmitResponse.description: Acknowledgement for a setup submission that has not persisted secrets yet.
SetupSubmitResponse.title: SetupSubmitResponse

confirmation.description: Must exactly equal wipe-local-data to confirm local data deletion.
confirmation.title: Confirmation

deleted_paths.description: Canonical local filesystem paths deleted by the wipe operation.
deleted_paths.title: Deleted Paths

missing_paths.description: Canonical local filesystem paths that were already absent.
missing_paths.title: Missing Paths

get.description: Returns canonical application rows from the local SQLite source of truth, optionally filtered by status, source, sponsorship, first-seen date range, role title, salary band, and work mode.

post.description: Marks applied applications as ghosted when their event timeline has no response after the configured silence threshold.

patch.description: Manually corrects one timeline event, locks the application from automatic overwrite, and records an audited event_edit correction.

post.description: Moves events from a duplicate source application into the target application, deletes the source application, and records an audited merge correction.
Clears one application's manual correction lock so future automatic aggregation can update the application summary again, and records an audited reset_lock correction.

Splits selected events out of an incorrectly grouped application into a deterministic manually locked application, locks the source application, recalculates timeline dates, derives target status from moved events, and records an audited manual correction.

patch.description: Manually corrects one application's current status, locks it from automatic overwrite, and records an audited status_edit correction.

get.description: Returns one canonical application row from the local SQLite source of truth.
Returns automatic evidence conflicts recorded for one manually corrected application without exposing private email body content.

schema.title: Response Get Application Correction Conflicts Applications  Id  Correction Conflicts Get

get.description: Returns the canonical event timeline for one application from local SQLite.

schema.title: Response Get Application Events Applications  Id  Events Get

get.description: Returns deterministic candidate counts, token estimates, and cost availability for a future bulk classification pass without calling an LLM or exposing email content.
Returns deterministic prompt/model-version buckets for retained classification candidates without calling an LLM or exposing email content.

post.description: Classifies retained email candidates through the configured LLM provider and idempotently stores classification results plus run accounting.

get.description: Return selected provider config plus recommended classification mode.

put.description: Validate and update provider config, applying recommendations on provider changes.

post.description: Verify selected LLM provider models through the configured provider adapter.

get.description: Returns the latest cached narrative insights from local SQLite, including stale records so clients can show when user-triggered regeneration is needed.

post.description: Forces one cached narrative insight to be regenerated through the configured LLM provider using deterministic facts and cited evidence from local SQLite.

Deletes configured local JobTracker data and derived artifacts after the request body confirms the exact wipe-local-data phrase. The service preflights every filesystem target and returns a typed 400 error instead of deleting anything when a target is unsafe.

Accepts non-secret Phase 0 setup choices and validates selected provider metadata without running provider auth flows or persisting secrets. When classification_mode is omitted, the backend applies the selected provider recommendation before validation.

get.description: Report setup status plus current and recommended classification modes.
Report the current email sync job status without exposing provider payloads.
